nasb.text: On the next day, their rulers and elders and scribes were gathered together in Jerusalem;

esv.text: On the next day their rulers and elders and scribes gathered together in Jerusalem,

cnv.text: 第二天，猶太人的官長、長老、經學家，都聚集在耶路撒冷，

ccb.text: 第二天，官长、长老和律法教师都聚集在耶路撒冷，

csbs.text: 到了第二天，犹太人的首领、长老和经文士们都聚集在耶路撒冷。
